briefing: Markets were mixed today — S&P 500 edged up +0.3% while NASDAQ slipped -0.2%, a classic neutral split that doesn't meet the risk-on threshold for new entries. With $577 in cash and 4 open slots, the top candidates (FIZZ, ARIS, MSTR, ECO all scoring 95 with clean 4-signal setups) are tempting, but the strategy playbook is explicit: neutral days are hold days. Existing positions are healthy and no stop-losses are triggered, so the right move is to preserve dry powder and wait for a NASDAQ +2% signal before deploying.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-on and risk-off describe the broad mood shift in markets from day to day. On risk-on days investors feel confident and buy growth stocks aggressively; on risk-off days they pull back into safety. A neutral day — like today with NASDAQ barely negative and S&P barely positive — sits in no-man's land where the risk/reward of new entries is unclear. The disciplined move is to wait for a clear risk-on signal before committing fresh capital.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）與「避險情緒」（Risk-Off）描述市場每日情緒的整體轉向。風險偏好日，投資者信心充足，積極搶入成長股；避險日則撤退至保守資產。今日那斯達克微跌、標普微升，屬於方向不明的中性格局，新倉進場的風險回報比不佳。策略上應等待明確的風險偏好信號再出手，避免在模糊市況中貿然建倉。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted into a quiet, mixed session on July 2 ahead of the July 4 Independence Day holiday, with pre-holiday thin volume softening momentum across growth sectors. The NASDAQ underperformed the S&P 500 as investors rotated modestly from technology into more defensive areas, a pattern common in pre-holiday low-liquidity trading. Resilient labor market data released earlier in the week kept Fed rate-cut expectations measured, limiting the upside catalyst growth stocks need to push higher.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股7月2日（獨立日長假前夕）交投淡靜，成交量明顯偏低，科技板塊動能受壓。那斯達克指數小幅下滑，跑輸標普500，資金輕微由成長股輪動至防禦性板塊，此乃假期前流動性收窄的常見現象。本週早些時候公布的就業數據依然強勁，令聯儲局減息預期保持審慎，壓抑利率敏感型成長股的上行動力。
